stemHtml: An aircraft is fitted with a MMR with a single control panel for use with ILS, MLS and GNSS approaches. What is the main advantage of this over individual systems for each approach type?

options.a: It allows the aircraft to use signals from ILS, GLS, MLS and GNSS simultaneously.
options.b: It integrates multiple functions, saving space in the cockpit.
options.c: A single receiver can process the signals from GPS, Galileo etc.
options.d: A single module can process signals from different landing systems.
